So glad I won't have to rent from them anymore since leaving bham.

review: Called to get a work order put in and was greeted with accusations and combativeness. Dan especially needs to straighten out his attitude. I expect at least a little respect as a customer. Accusing me of trying to start an argument when I was simply stating the circumstances and facts about a situation is no way to treat your tenants.

review: I know the rental market in Bellingham is atrocious, so many of us don't have a choice who we rent through, but if you can avoid it, DO NOT rent through Chuckanut.  Besides how dehumanizing the signing process is, they will milk you for every dollar they can after you leave.
